sections.heading: SMT Assembly Capabilities
sections.text: SMT Assembly Capabilities What is SMT Assembly? SMT, which stands for Surface Mount Technology, is a method of directly mounting electronic components onto the surface of a PCB. This method is commonly used for installing Surface Mount Devices (SMDs), which have smaller pins or are pinless in structure. Compared to traditional through-hole technology, SMT provides higher levels of automated manufacturing capabilities, reduces costs, and improves quality. Additionally, SMT allows for the installation of more components on a limited PCB board area. Through-hole technology is typically used for components such as large transformers and high-power heat-dissipating semiconductors that are not su...
